title: CavityGeometry
description: Catalog entry describing optical access, view factor, area multiplier, and coupling class of a receiver or hot-island cavity topology. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §9. Output-driving fields: optical_access_factor, surface_area_multiplier, nominal_view_factor, nominal_path_length_factor. Metadata-only fields: coupling_uniformity_class, manufacturability_class, notes[].

optical_access_factor.description: Fraction of source flux geometrically accessible to receiver [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §9.4. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §9.3.

surface_area_multiplier.description: Effective surface area relative to projected aperture [dimensionless, >= 1]. Output-driving per §9.4. Constraint: >= 1 per §9.3.

coupling_uniformity_class.description: Qualitative descriptor of coupling uniformity across receiver surface. Metadata-only per §9.4.

nominal_view_factor.description: Nominal radiative view factor from source to absorber [dimensionless, 0 < value <= 1]. Output-driving per §9.4. Constraint: 0 < value <= 1 per §9.3.

nominal_path_length_factor.description: Normalized optical path length relative to direct path [dimensionless, >= 1]. Output-driving per §9.4. Constraint: >= 1 per §9.3.

manufacturability_class.description: Qualitative manufacturability class descriptor. Metadata-only per §9.4.

output_effect_class.description: Declared output effect of this catalog entry per spec §12.4.

research_required.description: True if any output-driving coefficient is placeholder or hypothesis_only per spec §12.5.
